chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-3970 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 21.08.2025. Mr. Rashid Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG a/w SI/I.O. Ghulam Haider, PS Sohrab Goth. ------------------------------ I.O. Ghulam Haider of PS Sohrab Goth Karachi has recorded the statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Mst. Kiran d/o Ahmed Bux in which she has confirmed that she has contracted the marriage with Petitioner Faraz Ahmed at her own free will without any compulsion. I.O. states that he will file his report in ‘C’ class before concerned magistrate. He shall do so within 03 days of the date of this order. In the meantime no arrest shall be made under the FIR No.420 of 2025, u/s.365-B PPC of PS Sohrab Goth which has been registered in respect of this matter. The instant petition stands disposed of in the above manner alongwith pending applications, if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
